name: IMBE Frames 1-2
purpose: 18-octet IMBE voice frame, no supplemental data

name: IMBE Frames 3-8 (Link Control)
purpose: IMBE voice + 4 of 24 RS-encoded link-control code words per frame (refer to AABF-A)

name: IMBE Frame 9 (Low Speed Data 0)
purpose: IMBE voice + 2 octets of LSD0/LSD1

name: IMBE Frames 12-17 (Encryption Sync)
purpose: IMBE voice + 4 of 24 RS-encoded encryption-sync code words per frame

name: IMBE Frame 18 (Low Speed Data 2)
purpose: IMBE voice + 2 octets of LSD2/LSD3

name: PCM Audio (160 octets)
purpose: 160-octet μ-law PCM per 20 ms; G.711 encoding; analog RF mode or analog FSI

name: TC Packet Type
purpose: 2-octet transmission control header: Packet Type (0-11) + TSN (7 bits) + Losing Audio bit

name: Call Parameters / Voice Header
purpose: Not enumerated in this summary; see full text

name: Reserved / Session Params
purpose: Not enumerated in this summary; see full text

name: Conventional Header Word
purpose: Copy of the ISSI Header Word from BACA — MI, AlgID, Key ID, MFID, Group ID, NID

name: PTT Control / Source Ident
purpose: 56-bit station SUID (WACN+SysID+UnitID), console SUID, voice source ID, TX priority ($10 low..$F0 high), intercom flags

name: Link Control Identification
purpose: LCO opcodes (per AABF-A)

name: Link Control Data Block
purpose: LCO-specific payload per AABF-A

name: Station Control Request
purpose: Channel selection, repeat mode, squelch mode, second receiver, CTCSS code (A-H), protected mode, wildcard, RF mode — full report request

name: Station Control Response
purpose: Report cycle response

name: Station Status
purpose: Additional station-status fields

name: Single Block Control Command
purpose: Emergency alarm and data messages per AABC-B and AABG

name: Voter Command
purpose: REPORT / NORMAL / SELECT / DISABLE

name: Voter Status Update
purpose: NO_SIGNAL / SELECTED / GOOD_P25 / GOOD_FM / BAD_P25 / BAD_FM / NOT_EQUIPPED / FAILED

name: Connection Request
purpose: Port negotiation for session establishment

name: Control Service Heartbeat
purpose: Periodic liveness

name: Control Service Acknowledgement
purpose: ACK/NAK with codes 0-9

name: Disconnect Request
purpose: Session teardown

name: Manufacturer Specific
purpose: MFID + Length + data; vendor-proprietary extensions
